name: Vishay Precision Group, Inc.
summary: PART I DESCRIPTION General Vishay Precision Group, Inc. (VPG, the Company, we, us or our) is a global leader in precision measurement and sensing technologies that help power the future by bridging the physical world with the digital one. Many of our specialized sensors, weighing solutions, and measurement systems are designed-in by our customers, and address growing applications across a diverse array of industries and markets.
